attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY  ,
WIT.RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
WIT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
WIT.SS_CD                         ,
WIT.EXTENDED_TRNSFR_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
WIT.TRANSFER_PRICE_RT             ,
WIT.SS_TABLE_CD                   ,
WIT.INTERCOMPANY_PROCESSING_DT    ,
WIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT        ,
WIT.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD   ,
WIT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD   ,
WIT.RU_BK_TRNGLN_OPRTNG_UNIT_NM_CD,
WIT.RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE      ,
WIT.RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
WIT.RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
WIT.RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE       ,
WIT.RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD    ,
WIT.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM     ,
WIT.RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT  ,
WIT.RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG     ,
WIT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
WIT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
WIT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
WIT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
WIT.RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME ,
WIT.RU_SOL_CONFIG_ITEM_SHIPPED_QTY,
WIT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT   ,
WIT.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
WIT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            ,
WIT.RU_IC_TRX_COMPANY_CD          ,
WIT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT  ,
WIT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNLENTRY_LN_NUM_INT,
WIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD            ,
WIT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD              ,
WIT.DV_APPLICABLE_QTY             ,
WIT.RU_IC_TRX_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    ,
WIT.ACCOUNTING_DT ,
WIT.SOL_ROLE,
WIT.GL_ROLE,
WIT.AR_ROLE,
WIT.ACQSTN_INTG_SEG_NAME,
WIT.SRC_OF_REV_EXTRACT_CD,         
WIT.REV_ASGNMNT_NAME,              
WIT.SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,            
WIT.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT, 
WIT.RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
WIT.RU_GL_POSTED_DT,
WIT.RU_RAE_TYPE_CD,
WIT.RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
WIT.RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
WIT.RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
WIT.RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
WIT.RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
WIT.RAE_ROLE,
WIT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
WIT.RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
WIT.RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
WIT.RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
WIT.RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
WIT.RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
WIT.SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
WIT.DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
WIT.DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
WIT.EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_INTERCOMPANY_TRX WIT
 WHERE DML_TYPE = 'I'
 AND NOT EXISTS
 (
   SELECT 1
    FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
	WHERE NIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY = WIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY
 )
